title: Role Licence Requirement
description: Per-tenant baseline: which licence types a given role must hold. Owned by the NSW office (admin-editable). Drives gap/minimum-requirement alerts — a role member with no record for a mandatory type surfaces as a 'go collect' task. A gap means 'unknown/not captured', not 'definitely missing', so the alert prompts confirmation rather than asserting non-compliance.

role_licence_requirement_id.description: Internal canonical ID. Generated on insert if not provided.

tenant_id.description: Owning tenant. Set automatically by context.

role.description: The role/title this requirement applies to, matching staff role/title (e.g. 'Elec/Comms Tech', 'Office').

licence_type.description: Canonical licence_type code required for this role (mirrors licence.licence_type and licence_type.code).

mandatory.description: True = a missing record is a compliance gap (alerted). False = recommended-only.

notes.description: Free-form admin notes (why required, ref to policy, etc.).
